name: Zeera Murg (Cumin Chicken)
recipeIngredient: Whole or in fine strips (4.5 lb)
2 1/2 Inch piece Root Ginger, finely chopped
150 ml Fresh cream (or equal quantity of sour light cream) (1/2 cup)
1 can Coconut cream (if mixture seems too dry through prolonged cooking)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place chicken on a large plate and rub over with lemon juice. Set aside for at least 20 minutes, then pat dry with kitchen paper.
2. In a separate bowl, mix salt, cayenne pepper, and flour. Dredge the chicken pieces in this mixture, shaking off excess.
3. Melt butter in a pan, add the chicken, and fry until browned.
4. Add onions, garlic, ginger, and cumin seeds. Fry until golden brown.
5. Stir in yoghurt, cream, and lemon rind (if available). Return the chicken to the mixture and mix until all chicken is well coated.
6. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low and simmer for 1 hour or until chicken is cooked through.
7. Uncover the pan for the last 20 minutes to allow the sauce to reduce if desired.
8. Discard lemon rind before serving. If the mixture is too dry, add additional yoghurt or sour cream, and coconut cream as needed.
